positive: A whimsical, highly stylized, symmetrical depiction of a majestic forest spirit sitting on a glowing crescent moon. The spirit has delicate, flowing lines, ethereal wings made of bioluminescent flora, and gentle, knowing eyes. The background features stylized, winding root systems and glowing forest flora, rendered in deep emerald greens, sapphire blues, and iridescent gold accents. The overall style is neo-art nouveau, combining vintage engraving details with modern, vibrant digital illumination. The composition must be centered and suitable for apparel printing, featuring clean silhouettes and strong contrast against a single-color shirt background. Excellent detail, smooth vectors, high contrast, symmetrical.
